testcase.classname: export-data deep tests exportAllDataZip exports all tables and returns custom output path
testcase.name: export-data deep tests exportAllDataZip exports all tables and returns custom output path

testcase.classname: export-data deep tests exportAllDataZip uses default path when omitted
testcase.name: export-data deep tests exportAllDataZip uses default path when omitted

testcase.classname: db throws when required env vars are missing
testcase.name: db throws when required env vars are missing

testcase.classname: db uses DISCORD_GAME_DB_* values with default port 3306
testcase.name: db uses DISCORD_GAME_DB_* values with default port 3306

testcase.classname: db falls back to DB_* values and parses DB_PORT
testcase.name: db falls back to DB_* values and parses DB_PORT

testcase.classname: db DISCORD_GAME_DB values take precedence over DB_* fallback
testcase.name: db DISCORD_GAME_DB values take precedence over DB_* fallback

testcase.classname: Games game functions use default random source when omitted
testcase.name: Games game functions use default random source when omitted

testcase.classname: Games blackjack includes player, dealer, and result lines
testcase.name: Games blackjack includes player, dealer, and result lines

testcase.classname: Games blackjack draws additional cards for low totals
testcase.name: Games blackjack draws additional cards for low totals

testcase.classname: Games blackjack returns push for equal final totals
testcase.name: Games blackjack returns push for equal final totals

testcase.classname: Games blackjack returns dealer wins when dealer total beats player
testcase.name: Games blackjack returns dealer wins when dealer total beats player

testcase.classname: Games blackjack returns dealer wins when player busts
testcase.name: Games blackjack returns dealer wins when player busts

testcase.classname: Games blackjack returns player wins when dealer busts
testcase.name: Games blackjack returns player wins when dealer busts

testcase.classname: Games blackjack correctly adjusts ace value to avoid bust
testcase.name: Games blackjack correctly adjusts ace value to avoid bust

testcase.classname: Games blackjack includes every rank symbol when drawn
testcase.name: Games blackjack includes every rank symbol when drawn

testcase.classname: Games blackjack keeps ace at 11 for natural 21
testcase.name: Games blackjack keeps ace at 11 for natural 21

testcase.classname: Games blackjack does not hit when player total is exactly 16
testcase.name: Games blackjack does not hit when player total is exactly 16

testcase.classname: Games blackjack does not hit when dealer total is exactly 17
testcase.name: Games blackjack does not hit when dealer total is exactly 17

testcase.classname: Games blackjack player wins by higher total when nobody busts
testcase.name: Games blackjack player wins by higher total when nobody busts

testcase.classname: Games blackjack keeps player bust when multiple aces and high cards are drawn
testcase.name: Games blackjack keeps player bust when multiple aces and high cards are drawn

testcase.classname: Games plinko reports a path, lane, and payout
testcase.name: Games plinko reports a path, lane, and payout

testcase.classname: Games plinko stays within lane bounds for extreme left and right paths
testcase.name: Games plinko stays within lane bounds for extreme left and right paths

testcase.classname: Games plinko uses exactly six steps and maps 0.5 to right
testcase.name: Games plinko uses exactly six steps and maps 0.5 to right

testcase.classname: Games plinko mixed path validates starting position math
testcase.name: Games plinko mixed path validates starting position math

testcase.classname: Games mines returns a bounded pick and a result
testcase.name: Games mines returns a bounded pick and a result

testcase.classname: Games mines does not hang when random repeats
testcase.name: Games mines does not hang when random repeats

testcase.classname: Games mines safe path includes multiplier
testcase.name: Games mines safe path includes multiplier

testcase.classname: Games mines boom path includes boom result
testcase.name: Games mines boom path includes boom result

testcase.classname: Games mines fallback placement still completes with repeated random values
testcase.name: Games mines fallback placement still completes with repeated random values

testcase.classname: Games mines repeated random uses exactly 101 random calls total
testcase.name: Games mines repeated random uses exactly 101 random calls total

testcase.classname: Games mines fallback adds expected mine tiles for tile 2 pick
testcase.name: Games mines fallback adds expected mine tiles for tile 2 pick

testcase.classname: Games mines does not add a fourth mine in fallback loop
testcase.name: Games mines does not add a fourth mine in fallback loop

testcase.classname: platform utility modules getPlatformAnalytics aggregates db counts correctly
testcase.name: platform utility modules getPlatformAnalytics aggregates db counts correctly

testcase.classname: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity returns no alerts for low activity
testcase.name: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity returns no alerts for low activity

testcase.classname: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity returns both alerts for high activity
testcase.name: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity returns both alerts for high activity

testcase.classname: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity does not alert at exact threshold values
testcase.name: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity does not alert at exact threshold values

testcase.classname: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity handles empty aggregate rows without throwing
testcase.name: platform utility modules checkFraudulentActivity handles empty aggregate rows without throwing

testcase.name: platform utility modules getChartUrl returns encoded quickchart URL

testcase.classname: platform utility modules getChartUrl uses default title when omitted
testcase.name: platform utility modules getChartUrl uses default title when omitted

testcase.name: platform utility modules getPersonalizedOffer covers tier branches

testcase.classname: rag deep tests getRagIndex builds stats from default source directories and files
testcase.name: rag deep tests getRagIndex builds stats from default source directories and files

testcase.classname: rag deep tests queryRag returns ranked results, excludes ignored dirs, and clamps topK
testcase.name: rag deep tests queryRag returns ranked results, excludes ignored dirs, and clamps topK

testcase.classname: rag deep tests queryRag returns empty results for stopword-only query
testcase.name: rag deep tests queryRag returns empty results for stopword-only query

testcase.classname: rag deep tests answerWithContext returns fallback response when nothing matches
testcase.name: rag deep tests answerWithContext returns fallback response when nothing matches

testcase.classname: rag deep tests index cache is reused without forceRefresh and replaced with forceRefresh
testcase.name: rag deep tests index cache is reused without forceRefresh and replaced with forceRefresh

testcase.classname: rag deep tests queryRag can build index on cold module cache without pre-index call
testcase.name: rag deep tests queryRag can build index on cold module cache without pre-index call

testcase.classname: rag deep tests answerWithContext returns formatted summary when matches exist
testcase.name: rag deep tests answerWithContext returns formatted summary when matches exist

testcase.classname: rag deep tests indexing tolerates unreadable files, non-directory source paths, and ignored nested folders
testcase.name: rag deep tests indexing tolerates unreadable files, non-directory source paths, and ignored nested folders

testcase.classname: rag deep tests chunking creates multi-part chunks for large files and still returns ranked matches
testcase.name: rag deep tests chunking creates multi-part chunks for large files and still returns ranked matches

testcase.classname: rag deep tests tokenize returns empty array and buildIndex skips chunks when file content is all special chars
testcase.name: rag deep tests tokenize returns empty array and buildIndex skips chunks when file content is all special chars

testcase.classname: rag deep tests collectFiles skips files with non-indexable extensions
testcase.name: rag deep tests collectFiles skips files with non-indexable extensions

testcase.classname: rag deep tests collectFiles tolerates symlinks (non-file non-directory Dirent entries)
testcase.name: rag deep tests collectFiles tolerates symlinks (non-file non-directory Dirent entries)

testcase.classname: rag deep tests collectFiles ignores default source file entries that are directories not files
testcase.name: rag deep tests collectFiles ignores default source file entries that are directories not files

testcase.classname: rag deep tests buildIndex handles workspace where all indexed content produces empty chunks
testcase.name: rag deep tests buildIndex handles workspace where all indexed content produces empty chunks

testcase.classname: rag deep tests collectFiles walks non-ignored nested directories recursively
testcase.name: rag deep tests collectFiles walks non-ignored nested directories recursively

testcase.classname: rag deep tests chunkText skips empty trimmed windows (line 111 false branch)
testcase.name: rag deep tests chunkText skips empty trimmed windows (line 111 false branch)

testcase.classname: rag deep tests getRagIndex and queryRag use default rootDir when called without it (lines 238/245)
testcase.name: rag deep tests getRagIndex and queryRag use default rootDir when called without it (lines 238/245)

testcase.classname: rag deep tests queryRag clamps topK to at least one result slot
testcase.name: rag deep tests queryRag clamps topK to at least one result slot

testcase.classname: rag deep tests answerWithContext uses default rootDir when omitted
testcase.name: rag deep tests answerWithContext uses default rootDir when omitted

testcase.classname: audit-log writes audit row and closes connection
testcase.name: audit-log writes audit row and closes connection

testcase.classname: audit-log stores null details when omitted and still closes connection on failure
testcase.name: audit-log stores null details when omitted and still closes connection on failure

testcase.name: coin exchange deep tests parseCoinAmount validates and rounds input

testcase.name: coin exchange deep tests getCoinWallet ensures wallet, maps numeric values, and closes connection

testcase.name: coin exchange deep tests transferCoins rejects self-transfer before opening db connection

testcase.name: coin exchange deep tests transferCoins rolls back when sender has insufficient funds

testcase.name: coin exchange deep tests transferCoins updates balances, writes transactions, commits, and audits
